ab: nu puringai ta kulavaw qezetjen ta qaciljai a ringay nu puringai ta tjikurai seman vetjun a semeluc ta ringai.
ch: A:老鼠應該要⽤⽯壓式陷阱抓，⽵雞應該要⽤套頸式陷阱抓，這樣才對。
en: It is correct to catch mice through rangay and catch bamboo partridges through qjiulang.

ab: manu namaitucu tiaken a pasaliw djaljepan inika ken a djemamedjameq.
ch: B:原來是這樣，我都搞錯了！難怪我都抓不到。
en: No wonder! I am mistaken and that’s why I cannot catch any of them.

ab: ku tuluai sun tu kemuda semanaya taicu a drusa ringai.
ch: A:那我再教你怎麼製作這兩種陷阱。
en: Then I will teach you how to set up these two traps.

ab: bulai bulaiangata nu tjaivililj tjara madjameq a sacemel.
ch: B:好啊！太棒了！這樣我以後就會抓到獵物了。
en: Great! I will be able to catch the prey in the future.

ab: qaca anga cemel i vavua sau alapu ta tjakit a masuku vaiki a semavavua.
ch: A:田裡的草太長了，你去倉庫拿鐮刀，我們去田裡。
en: The grass in the fields is too tall. Go to the warehouse to take the sickle and let’s go to the fields.

ab: piniinu a tjakit?
ch: B:鐮刀放在哪裡?
en: Where are the sickles?

ab: i ljaqedi ta tjakaz nu ljetaladj sun ta suku su pacunan.
ch: A:在圓簍的旁邊，你進去倉庫就會看到了。
en: It is next to the round basket. You will see it when you enter the warehouse.

ab: kipapaulingavu ta malap nakuya mapasaqetju radjai a tjakit.
ch: A:小心拿，不要受傷。鐮刀很利。
en: Be careful and don’t get hurt. The sickle is very sharp.

ab: maya djemulat a ku ringai!
ch: A:不要踩到我的陷阱!
en: Don’t step on my trap!

ab: inu a su ringai?
ch: B:你的陷阱在哪裡?
en: Where is your trap?

ab: iteku ta kasiw a ku ringai.
ch: A:我的陷阱在那棵樹的下面。
en: My trap is under that tree.

ab: aku sun a paqenetj?
ch: B:你怎麼會記得?
en: How do you remember?

ab: izua ku sinipukeljang imaza kemeljang aken tu inu aku ringai.
ch: A:我在這邊有做記號，我知道我的陷阱在哪裡。
en: I make a mark here, so I know where my trap is.

ab: aicu surunung tja pizuain i veleljuan tu sidjameq ta ciqaw.
ch: A:這是魚筌，我們放在溪邊捕魚。
en: This is a fish trap which we put beside the river for fishing.

ab: neka nu niamen a surunung panadip a nia sikiciqaciqaw.
ch: B:我們那邊沒有魚筌，我們都用釣竿抓魚。
en: We don’t have any fish traps there, so we catch fish with a fishing rod.

ab: inianan aken a cekau ta panadip nu tjaivililj tului anga ken?
ch: A:我沒有用過釣竿，你下次教我好嗎?
en: I have never used a fishing rod before, would you mind teaching me next time?

ab: bulai kaciyuri anga nu tjaivililj a panadip ta ciqaw.
ch: B:好啊!我們下次一起去釣魚。
en: Sure! Let’s go fishing together next time.

ab: numaya nu tjaivililj ku tuluai anga sun tu kemuda semanaya ta surunung.
ch: A:那我下次教你做魚筌。
en: I will teach you how to make a fish trap next time.

ab: garavagavagav anga su panadip manu izua nga ciqaw a na mapanadip rakacu a kirimu.
ch: A:你的釣竿動了，是不是有魚上鉤了!你快拉起來。
en: Your fishing rod is moving. Isn’t the fish on the hook? Pull it up!

ab: mayanan mariqeriq aravac a varukur tjemaza ken a remakac ta panadip sazuau pusaladji aken a malap ta arai.
ch: B:等等，船太晃了。我在這邊拉釣竿，你去那邊幫我拿網子來。
en: Wait, the ship is rolling heavily. I am here to pull the fishing rod and you should go there to grab me the net.

ab: rakacu a pasamaza i tja nu a ken ku pusaladja sun a remakac.
ch: A:你把魚拉到我這邊。我幫妳拉起來。
en: Pull the fish to my side and I will help you pull it up.

ab: bulai angata tucu na mapeljuq anga ciqaw i ta surungung.
ch: A:太好了!今天大豐收，魚簍都裝滿了。
en: Great! It is a bumper crop today with full fish baskets.

ab: vaiki a kirimu a semiljeva ta tja salasaladj.
ch: B:我們快回去和大家分享。
en: Let’s go back immediately and share it with everyone.
